summary: Completed comprehensive testing of bulk operations and mobile responsiveness features. All 19 backend API tests pass (100%). Frontend UI tests confirm bulk selection, bulk actions toolbar, bulk status/stage dropdowns, and bulk delete confirmation dialog all work correctly. Mobile responsiveness verified - hamburger menu, collapsible sidebar, 2-column stat cards, full-width buttons, and responsive table columns (hiding Date, Sizes, Fabric, Style, Status on mobile) all functioning properly.
passed_tests: Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status changes status to 'In Progress' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status changes status to 'Completed' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status changes status to 'Delayed' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status rejects invalid status (400)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status rejects empty lot_ids (400)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-status requires authentication (401)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage changes stage to 'Stitching' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage changes stage to 'Bartack' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage changes stage to 'Washing/Dyeing' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage changes stage to 'Completed' sets status to 'Completed' (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage rejects invalid stage (400)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage rejects empty lot_ids (400)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-stage requires authentication (401)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-delete deletes multiple lots (200)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-delete rejects empty lot_ids (400)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-delete requires authentication (401)
Backend API: POST /api/lots/bulk-delete handles non-existent IDs gracefully (deleted_count: 0)
Backend API: Stage 'Cutting' sets status to 'Pending'
Backend API: Stage 'Stitching' sets status to 'In Progress'
Frontend: Lots page loads successfully
Frontend: Select All checkbox found and works
Frontend: Individual lot checkboxes work
Frontend: Bulk actions toolbar appears when lots selected
Frontend: Toolbar shows '247 lots selected' with Select All
Frontend: Clear selection button works - toolbar disappears
Frontend: Bulk status dropdown has options: Pending, In Progress, Completed, Delayed
Frontend: Bulk stage dropdown has options: Cutting, Stitching, Bartack, Washing/Dyeing, Completed
Frontend: Bulk delete button shows confirmation dialog
Frontend: Delete dialog has Cancel and Delete buttons
Mobile: Hamburger menu button found
Mobile: Sidebar opens on hamburger click
Mobile: Dashboard loads with 2-column stat cards grid
Mobile: New Lot button is full-width (358px on 390px viewport)
Mobile: Table columns reduced - only Lot No, Pcs, Stage, Actions visible
Mobile: Date column correctly hidden on mobile
Mobile: Sizes column correctly hidden on mobile
Mobile: Fabric column correctly hidden on mobile
Mobile: Style column correctly hidden on mobile
Mobile: Status column correctly hidden on mobile
Mobile: Bulk toolbar shows on mobile
Mobile: All bulk action controls visible on mobile
critical_code_review_comments: Bulk operations endpoints properly validate lot_ids array - return 400 if empty
Bulk stage change correctly updates overall_status based on stage (Cutting→Pending, others→In Progress, Completed→Completed)
Mobile responsiveness using Tailwind responsive classes (hidden sm:table-cell, hidden md:table-cell, hidden lg:table-cell) works correctly
Bulk actions toolbar uses flex-col sm:flex-row for mobile-friendly stacking
All bulk action handlers include proper loading states with bulkActionLoading flag
seed_data_creation: Test lots created during pytest execution were cleaned up in fixture teardown
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bulk operations fully tested and working: 1) POST /api/lots/bulk-delete - requires auth, validates lot_ids, deletes lots and associated stage data, 2) POST /api/lots/bulk-status - changes status for multiple lots (Pending, In Progress, Completed, Delayed), 3) POST /api/lots/bulk-stage - changes stage and auto-sets appropriate status. Mobile responsiveness: Dashboard stat cards in 2-column grid, table hides columns progressively (sm/md/lg breakpoints), buttons full-width, hamburger menu for sidebar.
